title: SG60 Vouchers
text:
SG60 Vouchers - SupportGoWhere
SG60 Vouchers
Share link
For all Singaporean adults in recognition of their contributions to the nation and to share the gains of Singapore's progress during SG60.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$600 of vouchers for Singapore Citizens aged 21 to 59 in 2025; and $800 of vouchers for Singapore Citizens aged 60 and above in 2025
Vouchers will be disbursed across July 2025
Can be used at all participating businesses of the CDC Voucher scheme
Collapse all sections
About this support

$600 in SG60 Vouchers for Singapore Citizens aged 21 to 59 in 2025

$800 in SG60 Vouchers for Singapore Citizens aged 60 and above in 2025

Vouchers will be disbursed across July 2025

Singaporean seniors will receive the vouchers first, followed by all other Singaporean adults

Can be used at all participating businesses of the CDC Voucher scheme

Half of the vouchers can be used at participating heartland merchants and hawkers, and the other half can be used at participating supermarkets

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

Aged 21 and above in 2025

How to apply?

No application is required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 03 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
